title: GE Widescreen 1000: Big time TV for big budgets
content:
The GE Widescreen 1000 was a big time TV for big time budgets in an era of excess, with the tagline “This is GE Performance Television.” Introduced in June 1978, it cost about 3/4 as much as a family sedan

The post GE Widescreen 1000: Big time TV for big budgets appeared first on The Silicon Underground.
